title: CLI Help Tree
description: Canonical output schema for discover.py — the parsed help tree for a CLI binary.

cli.description: Metadata about the discovered CLI binary.

name.description: CLI identifier (lowercase, hyphens and digits only).

binary.description: Absolute path to the resolved binary (e.g. /usr/local/bin/gh).

version.description: Version string reported by the CLI (free-form; not required to be semver).

summary.description: One-line description from the CLI's top-level help output.

homepage.description: Project homepage URL as reported by the CLI.

global_flags.description: Flags accepted by every subcommand (from the top-level --help).

groups.description: Command groups discovered by walking the help tree, flattened into this array. Nesting is expressed via path length, not nested objects. A deep group like 'kubectl create deployment' appears here as {name: 'create-deployment', path: ['create', 'deployment']} — a sibling of {name: 'pr', path: ['pr']}, not a child of any 'create' entry. Underscores in CLI-reported names must be normalized to hyphens for the 'name' field; the 'path' array retains the original segments.

name.description: Group name as it appears in the CLI (e.g. 'pr').

path.description: Invocation path segments for this group (length >= 1).

summary.description: One-line description from the group's help output.

raw_help.description: Full raw help text captured when structured parsing falls back.

discovery.description: Metadata about the discovery run itself.

depth_reached.description: Maximum nesting depth reached during the walk.

commands_walked.description: Total number of subcommand help pages fetched.

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock time for the entire discovery run, in milliseconds.

flag.description: A single CLI flag. At least one of 'short' or 'long' must be present.

argument.description: Argument placeholder shown in help text (e.g. 'string', 'OWNER/REPO').

description.description: Flag description from the help output.

command.description: A leaf subcommand within a group.

name.description: Subcommand name as it appears in the CLI (e.g. 'list').

path.description: Full invocation path for this command (length >= 2; first element matches the parent group name).

summary.description: One-line description from the subcommand's help output.

usage.description: Usage line from the subcommand's help output (e.g. 'gh pr list [flags]').

raw_help.description: Full raw help text captured when structured parsing falls back.
